name: biloba
description: Write fast, stable browser tests with Biloba in your own Ginkgo/Gomega suite. Skills for setup, the dual immediate/matcher API, semantic role/text/label locators, realistic interactions (b.Realistic() for occlusion/hover/drag), the XPath DSL, a full API reference, orienting to an unfamiliar page, debugging failures, and diagnosing/preventing flaky specs.
